summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ERP V2 features. All 6 new features working correctly: performance optimization with pagination/caching, brand management, manual transactions with custom categories, print-friendly receipts with amount tendered/change due, bulk CSV import for products/inventory, and custom orders module with status tracking and payments.

fixed_issues.fix_applied: Moved template routes before generic product ID routes

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with Custom Orders count (showing 2)
Navigation sidebar shows Custom Orders link with Scissors icon
Products page: server-side search, Download Template and Import CSV buttons exist
Inventory page: Template and Import buttons for bulk import exist
POS page: search, barcode scan, cart, checkout with amount tendered functionality
Custom Orders page: accessible, New Order button, status filters working
Accounting Transactions tab: Add Transaction and Manage Categories buttons exist
Accounting Daily Sales, Income Statement, Balance Sheet tabs working
Settings page: loads correctly with Brand Management functionality
All 37 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Manual transactions and custom categories CRUD working
Custom orders status progression and payment collection working
Bulk CSV import templates for products and inventory working

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor loading states normal)
